title: Residence / TRC / Citizenship
description: This category explains common residence situations for foreigners in Poland: temporary residence permits connected to work, studies, and family; residence registration for EU/EFTA/Swiss citizens; and the two official routes to Polish citizenship, plus how a Polish passport fits in. It helps you recognize the institutions, terms, and documents involved and find the official pages that describe each path.
owns: legal stay and residence cards at a general level
temporary residence connected to work (single permit)
Polish citizenship (recognition and presidential grant) and passport basics
doesNotOwn: employment settlement or disputes with an employer
personal eligibility decisions or legal strategy for your case
